# Elite Admissions Consulting
> MBA and MS admissions consulting by HEC Paris and SDA Bocconi alumni

## About
Elite Admissions Consulting helps engineers and professionals gain admission 
to M7 MBA programs and top European MBAs including HEC Paris and SDA Bocconi.
Our consultants are alumni of these programs with firsthand admissions experience.

## Services
- MBA admissions consulting (M7, HEC Paris, SDA Bocconi, INSEAD)
- MS/Masters admissions consulting
- Profile evaluation
- Essay coaching
- Interview preparation

## Contact
- Website: https://elite-admissions-consulting.com
- Email: consultingelitemba@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/elite-masters-consulting/

## Why Choose Us
- Founded by HEC Paris and SDA Bocconi alumni
- ROI-driven narrative strategy
- Specialized in European and (Ivy League) M7 programs

## Insights / Blog
Admissions strategy articles for M7, HEC Paris, SDA Bocconi, and Master's applicants.
- Blog index: https://elite-admissions-consulting.com/blog
- How to Get Into the HEC Paris MBA: https://elite-admissions-consulting.com/blog/how-to-get-into-hec-paris-mba

- M7 MBA Essays for Engineers: https://elite-admissions-consulting.com/blog/m7-mba-essays-for-engineers
- HEC Paris vs INSEAD: Which MBA Is Right for You?: https://elite-admissions-consulting.com/blog/hec-paris-vs-insead-which-mba
- GMAT vs GRE for Top MBA Programs: https://elite-admissions-consulting.com/blog/gmat-vs-gre-for-mba
- AI Can Write Your MBA Essay, But It Can't Choose Your Story: https://elite-admissions-consulting.com/blog/ai-cant-choose-your-mba-essay-story
- How to Choose the Right MBA School: https://elite-admissions-consulting.com/blog/how-to-choose-the-right-mba-school
